name_cn:
Bottega Veneta 2025 New Arrival
PINACOTECA bag, iconic weaving craftsmanship, crafted with 10mm Intrecciato technique, featuring suede lining. Four leather strips add personality and stability. Relaxed and refined, reversible design, shoulder carry or hand carry.
Four ties can be adjusted into different shapes, dual-use for versatile switching, easily blending into your daily rhythm.
Model No.: 817166
Dimensions: 43*23*17.5cm
